title: Query exact ledger actuals
preconditions: The local Ledger is readable; filter semantics and date/sign conventions are discoverable.
postconditions: Equivalent unchanged queries return identical membership, attribution, Reconciliation State, ordering, and exact totals; empty and unassigned buckets are explicit; pagination retains first-page membership and aggregates.
main_flow: 1. The caller submits explicit filters and output contract version. 2. Tally validates the filter combination. 3. Tally selects active Canonical Transaction using Effective Date, category and Pool Assignment, instrument or Cardholder Attribution, relationship, correction, evidence, and reconciliation rules. 4. Tally establishes one immutable snapshot containing membership, state, and separately named Net Account Movement, External Spend, and Budget Actual aggregates by requested pool and category. 5. Later pages read the same snapshot even if writes occur; an unavailable snapshot fails explicitly. 6. The caller reconciles every aggregate to the exact selected set, including explicit uncategorized and unassigned-pool buckets. 7. BUDGET and INSIGHTS consume the public result rather than duplicate financial rules.
alt_flows: 2a. A filter or dimension combination is invalid -> reject with structured errors
3a. The store or relationship history fails integrity validation -> return no aggregate
4a. Results exceed one response -> return a deterministic snapshot-bound cursor and unchanged full-set totals
5a. Snapshot is expired or unavailable -> fail explicitly and never continue against live state
6a. Any pool, category, or named aggregate differs from its exact formula -> treat as an integrity failure
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner needs trustworthy transaction membership or exact actuals for a period, account, category, spend pool, payment instrument, cardholder, lifecycle, relationship, evidence, or reconciliation state.","status":"draft"}
